(Translated by Google)
The breakfast is very nice.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16093166206795082767/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQ2M3R2STVRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Muy bien para parar. Baños instalaciones limpias.

(Translated by Google)
Great place to stop. Clean restrooms and facilities.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16093166206795082767/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQ2cnFqa2ZBEAE

reviews.comment:
Baños impecables, esta una señora llamada Gladys q limpia despues de cada persona q utiliza el baño. Alcohol en todas las mesas, buen cafe y buenisumas enzaimadas. Shop con variedad de comidas. Este es nuestra primera parada siempre.

(Translated by Google)
Spotless restrooms; there's a lady named Gladys who cleans after each person. Alcohol on every table, good coffee, and delicious ensaimadas. Shop with a variety of food. This is always our first stop.

reviewReply.comment: Muchas gracias por su opinión,los esperamos siempre

reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16093166206795082767/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQ2anMyV0xREAE

reviews.comment:
Muy bien por el Aca. Tiene las mejores estaciones, con agua caliente GRATIS , buenos sitios para descansar, sombra etc. Personal muy amable. En Maschwitz un predio ideal para el descanso, aunque exclusivo para socios. Un diez.

(Translated by Google)
Great job, ACA! It has the best facilities, with free hot water, good places to rest, shade, etc. Very friendly staff. In Maschwitz, it's an ideal place to relax, although it's exclusively for members. A perfect ten.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16093166206795082767/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQ2aHVmclZnEAE

reviews.comment:
La estación es hermosa y tiene un lugar de juegos para niños precioso. Las pocas veces que fui tuve maña suerte con los estacioneros. Me sobrepasaron el tanque y no me ofrecieron limpiarme el parabrisas

(Translated by Google)
The station is beautiful and has a lovely children's play area. The few times I've been there, I've had bad luck with the attendants. They overcharged me and didn't offer to clean my windshield.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16093166206795082767/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQ2LXVlMWd3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Excelente Atención, precios muy accesibles, buen lugar para un descanso breve. Baños muy limpios. Muy recomendable

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service, very affordable prices, a great place for a short break. Very clean bathrooms. Highly recommended.

reviewReply.comment: MUCHAS GRACIAS POR SU COMENTARIO, LO ESPERAMOS A LA BREVEDAD

reviews.comment:
Cercano a ruta. Muy recomendable mientras que para usar instalaciones en el centro de San Pedro debes consumir.

(Translated by Google)
Close to the main road. Highly recommended, although to use the facilities in downtown San Pedro you must make a purchase.

reviews.comment:
es hermoso el parque que tiene. no es una ypf Full. es del ACA por ende no tiene la gastronomia de lasFULL pero es un muy lindo lugar. muy limpio

(Translated by Google)
The park there is beautiful. It's not a YPF Full station. It's an ACA station, so it doesn't have the same food as the Full stations, but it's a very nice place. Very clean.

(Translated by Google)
It's good, it's better during the day than at night because of the large park next door.
